raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "ACA 27 would require greater transparency and openness in setting salaries and how the UC system spends money.",
    "ACA 27 would limit the length of regents' terms from 12 years to 4.",
    "ACA 27 would prohibit compensation that exceeds $200,000 per year unless approved in a public hearing.",
    "ACA 27 would require the Office of the UC President to submit a yearly report on expenditures.",
    "ACA 27 would limit the position of the UC President to be a non-voting member of the board.",
    "Savings found at the nearly $800 million UC Administration budget means more monies to enroll qualified California students.",
    "Increasing public trust through transparency and accountability of UC is critical to the success of the institution.",
    "ACA 27 ends secret reserve funds, keeps spending in check and promotes accountability.",
    "A State Audit of the University of California, Office of the President, found that the Office of the President had 'amassed substantial reserve funds, used misleading budgeting practices, provided its employees with generous salaries and atypical benefits, and failed to satisfactorily justify its spending on system wide initiatives.'"
  ]
}
```
